purpose: ConfirmedPurchasePrep cross_reference_evidence.ledger_lookup wire 의 다음 sprint 진입을 위한 readiness 평가. R2 ledger row + budget classifier helper 와 결합하기 위한 사전 준비.

components_in_place.name: ConfirmedPurchaseNoSendPreview builder wire
components_in_place.next_step: ledger_lookup 인자에 실제 row 결과 채움

missing_for_full_wire.name: operational_payment_complete_lookup_helper
missing_for_full_wire.purpose: 운영DB read-only로 order_no 기준 PAYMENT_COMPLETE 상태 조회 (transient input, hash 처리 즉시)

missing_for_full_wire.name: google_ads_click_view_exact_lookup_helper
missing_for_full_wire.purpose: Google Ads click_view API 또는 캐시된 결과에서 gclid/gbraid/wbraid 매칭 + campaign_id 반환
missing_for_full_wire.note: 기존 google-ads-campaign-id-join-candidates 산출 로직과 통합 가능

missing_for_full_wire.name: 운영 dry-run with real ledger row + paid evidence
missing_for_full_wire.purpose: 1h canary 가 누적한 row 가 있을 때 builder dry-run 으로 budget_usable 분포 측정

wire_pseudo_code_for_next_sprint: classification = classifyLedgerRowToBudgetClassification({ ledger_row: rows[0].previewSnapshot, payment_complete_join: payment, click_view_exact: click })

return { paid_click_intent_same_order_match: classification.budget_usable, order_bridge_same_order_match: rows[0].click_id_hash !== '', matched_click_id_type: classification.click_id_type, matched_hash_prefix: rows[0].order_no_hash.slice(0,8) }

expected_effect_after_full_wire.after_wire_with_population_p_paid_p_clic: session_only_quarantine row 누적 + 운영DB PAYMENT_COMPLETE join + click_view exact 가 동시 있는 row 만큼 A_via_ledger_budget_floor 후보로 승급. 첫 1h canary 에는 0~소수 row 예상 (footer payload 에 raw email/phone 부재 + 운영DB sync lag 영향).
expected_effect_after_full_wire.next_signal_to_watch: 다음 sprint full wire 후 builder dry-run 의 npay_actual_confirmed_count + cross_reference_evidence A_via_ledger_budget_floor 카운트
